title: Counters.java - MapReduce Counter Management
description: This Java file, Counters.java, is central to Apache Hadoop MapReduce's counter management system. It defines the Counters class, responsible for organizing per-job/task counters into distinct groups. The core logic involves three inner classes: FrameworkGroupImpl, GenericGroup, and FileSystemGroup, each extending AbstractCounterGroup<Counter> and implementing CounterGroup. These classes handle framework-defined, generic, and file system-specific counters respectively. The GroupFactory class provides methods for creating these counter groups. This file does not have explicit inputs or outputs; it serves as a container for counter data managed elsewhere in the MapReduce framework. Its dependencies include various classes from the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.counters package, indicating its integral role in Hadoop's counter management architecture.
